mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_BOM
PAR_PARTNO LIKE #{search}
SELECT * FROM TBL_COM_BOM WHERE PAR_PARTNO = #{PAR_PARTNO} AND CHILD_PARTNO = #{CHILD_PARTNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_BOM ( PAR_PARTNO, CHILD_PARTNO, REQQTY, ORD, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{PAR_PARTNO}, #{CHILD_PARTNO}, #{REQQTY}, #{ORD}, #{USEYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_BOM SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE PAR_PARTNO = #{PAR_PARTNO} AND CHILD_PARTNO = #{CHILD_PARTNO}
